title: Automation Priority
excerpt: I need items to duplicate and then archive at a set time. Priority of automation. For example I have a monthly group and I need all of the times to duplicate Feb 1 @ 1AM and then for all of the old items to archive Feb 1…

posts.author: Kbuttram (Kendell)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need items to duplicate and then archive at a set time. Priority of automation. For example I have a monthly group and I need all of the times to duplicate Feb 1 @ 1AM and then for all of the old items to archive Feb 1 @ 3AM.

Unfortunately while you can set these times in an automation rule I have been told by a Monday representative that automation rules set on the same action in the same day will compete with themselves causing wonky and inconsistent automations.
